forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Fee-based methods (Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple) used DeFiLlama protocol fee data to anchor the valuation. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple produced a value below 10% of current price (fees are low relative to market cap) — shown in the breakdown chart but excluded from the median pool. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Metcalfe Network Value (MC/Volume ratio) confirmed the NVT signal and contributed to the median pool. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment penalises the large gap between circulating and fully-diluted supply — future token unlocks are expected to create selling pressure. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

FIL.iv_method: Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, Dilution Adjustment
